message.content:
## Task: Delete dead test tabtargets and fix testbench unknown command listing

You are working on pace ₢ATAAb in heat ₣AT (rbw-regime-consolidation).

### Part 1: Delete dead tabtargets

These 4 tabtargets use the legacy `mbd.dispatch.sh` dispatcher and are NOT routed through the current `rbw_workbench.sh`. They are confirmed dead. Delete them:

```
tt/rbw-tb.TestBottles.parallel.sh
tt/rbw-tb.TestBottles.single.sh
tt/rbw-tf.FastTest.sh
tt/rbw-tg.TestGithubWorkflow.sh
```

Use `rm` via Bash to delete these files.

### Part 2: Fix testbench unknown command

File: `Tools/rbw/rbtb_testbench.sh`

The `rbtb_route` function (line 233) has a case statement routing commands. The fallthrough `*) buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}"` should instead print available test colophons with descriptions, then exit 0.

Current case statement (lines 245-254):
```bash
  case "${z_command}" in
    rbw-ta) butd_run_all ;;
    rbw-ts) butd_run_suite "${1:-}" ;;
    rbw-to) butd_run_one "${1:-}" ;;
    rbw-tns) butd_run_suite "nsproto-security" ;;
    rbw-tj) butd_run_suite "srjcl-jupyter" ;;
    rbw-tpl) butd_run_suite "pluml-diagram" ;;
    rbw-trg) butd_run_suite "regime-smoke" ;;
    *)       buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}" ;;
  esac
```

Replace the `*)` fallthrough with a helpful listing. Use `buc_info` for output. Format:

```
Available test commands:
  rbw-ta   Run all suites
  rbw-ts   Run single suite (pass suite name)
  rbw-to   Run single test function (pass function name)
  rbw-tns  Run nsproto-security suite
  rbw-tj   Run srjcl-jupyter suite
  rbw-tpl  Run pluml-diagram suite
  rbw-trg  Run regime-smoke suite
```

If `z_command` was empty, just show the listing. If `z_command` was provided but unrecognized, show `buc_warn "Unknown command: ${z_command}"` THEN show the listing. In both cases return 0 (do not die).

Note: `buc_info` and `buc_warn` are available (sourced via buc_command.sh).

### Also fix rbw_workbench.sh unknown command

File: `Tools/rbw/rbw_workbench.sh`

Similarly, the workbench has `*) buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}"` at line 114. Replace this with a similar pattern: warn if command was provided, then list available command groups with brief descriptions, then return 0.

Read the file first to see all the command groups in the case statement, then produce a clean listing of them.

## Wrap Discipline

DO NOT run jjx_close or mark the pace complete. When work is done:
1. Report what files you changed/deleted
2. STOP — the calling agent will confirm wrap with the user

content.text:
I'll complete this task in three parts: delete the dead tabtargets, fix the testbench unknown command handling, and fix the workbench unknown command handling.

## Part 1: Delete dead tabtargets

input.description: Delete 4 dead test tabtargets that use legacy dispatcher

    37→source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgd_DepotConstants.sh"
    38→source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbob_bottle.sh"
    39→

    41→source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbtckk_KickTires.sh"
    42→source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbtcal_ArkLifecycle.sh"
    43→source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/butcde_DispatchExercise.sh"
    44→source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbtcns_NsproSecurity.sh"
    45→source "${RBTB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbtcsj_SrjclJupyter.sh"

    49→
    50→buc_context "${0##*/}"
    51→zrbcc_kindle
    52→
    53→######################################################################
    54→# Shared test helpers (migrated from rbt_testbench.sh)
    55→
    56→rbtb_show() {
    57→  test "${BURD_VERBOSE:-0}" != "1" || echo "RBTSHOW: $*"
    58→}
    59→
    60→rbtb_load_nameplate() {
    61→  local z_moniker="${1:-}"
    62→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "rbtb_load_nameplate: moniker argument required"
    63→
    64→  rbtb_show "Loading nameplate: ${z_moniker}"
    65→  rbrn_load_moniker "${z_moniker}"
    66→
    67→  rbtb_show "Nameplate loaded: RBRN_MONIKER=${RBRN_MONIKER}, RBRN_RUNTIME=${RBRN_RUNTIME}"
    68→
    69→  rbtb_show "Loading RBRR"
    70→  rbrr_load
    71→
    72→  rbtb_show "Kindling RBGC/RBGD/RBOB"
    73→  zrbgc_kindle
    74→  zrbgd_kindle
    75→  zrbob_kindle
    76→}
    77→
    78→rbtb_exec_sentry() {
    79→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" "$@"
    80→}
    81→
    82→rbtb_exec_sentry_i() {
    83→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" "$@"
    84→}
    85→
    86→rbtb_exec_censer() {
    87→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" "$@"
    88→}
    89→
    90→rbtb_exec_censer_i() {
    91→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" "$@"
    92→}
    93→
    94→rbtb_exec_bottle() {
    95→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" "$@"
    96→}
    97→
    98→rbtb_exec_bottle_i() {
    99→  ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME} exec -i "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" "$@"
   100→}
   101→
   102→######################################################################
   103→# Setup functions
   104→
   105→zrbtb_setup_kick() {
   106→  buto_trace "Setup for kick-tires suite (no-op)"
   107→}
   108→
   109→zrbtb_setup_ark() {
   110→  buto_trace "Setup for ark-lifecycle suite"
   111→  zbuz_kindle
   112→  zrbz_kindle
   113→  bute_init_dispatch
   114→  bute_init_evidence
   115→  ZRBTB_ARK_VESSEL_SIGIL="trbim-macos"
   116→}
   117→
   118→zrbtb_setup_dispatch() {
   119→  buto_trace "Setup for dispatch-exercise suite"
   120→  zbuz_kindle
   121→  buz_register "butctt" "butcde_DispatchExercise" "butcde_run"
   122→  ZBUTCDE_TEST_COLOPHON="${z1z_buz_colophon}"
   123→}
   124→
   125→zrbtb_setup_nsproto() {
   126→  buto_trace "Setup for nsproto-security suite"
   127→  rbtb_load_nameplate "nsproto"
   128→}
   129→
   130→zrbtb_setup_srjcl() {
   131→  buto_trace "Setup for srjcl-jupyter suite"
   132→  rbtb_load_nameplate "srjcl"
   133→}
   134→
   135→zrbtb_setup_pluml() {
   136→  buto_trace "Setup for pluml-diagram suite"
   137→  rbtb_load_nameplate "pluml"
   138→}
   139→
   140→zrbtb_setup_xname() {
   141→  buto_trace "Setup for xname-validation suite (no-op)"
   142→}
   143→
   144→zrbtb_setup_regime() {
   145→  buto_trace "Setup for regime-smoke suite (no-op)"
   146→}
   147→
   148→
   149→######################################################################
   150→# Registration
   151→
   152→rbtb_kindle() {
   153→  butr_kindle
   154→
   155→  # kick-tires suite
   156→  butr_suite_enroll "kick-tires" "" "zrbtb_setup_kick"
   157→  butr_case_enroll "kick-tires" rbtckk_false
   158→  butr_case_enroll "kick-tires" rbtckk_true
   159→
   160→  # ark-lifecycle suite
   161→  butr_suite_enroll "ark-lifecycle" "" "zrbtb_setup_ark"
   162→  butr_case_enroll "ark-lifecycle" rbtcal_lifecycle
   163→
   164→  # dispatch-exercise suite
   165→  butr_suite_enroll "dispatch-exercise" "" "zrbtb_setup_dispatch"
   166→  butr_case_enroll "dispatch-exercise" butcde_burv_isolation
   167→  butr_case_enroll "dispatch-exercise" butcde_evidence_created
   168→  butr_case_enroll "dispatch-exercise" butcde_exit_capture
   169→
   170→  # nsproto-security suite
   171→  butr_suite_enroll "nsproto-security" "" "zrbtb_setup_nsproto"
   172→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_basic_dnsmasq
   173→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_basic_iptables
   174→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_basic_ping_sentry
   175→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_block_packages
   176→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_allow_anthropic
   177→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_altport
   178→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_cloudflare
   179→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_direct
   180→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_google
   181→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_ipv6
   182→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_multicast
   183→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_quad9
   184→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_spoofing
   185→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_tunneling
   186→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_block_zonetransfer
   187→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_nonexist
   188→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_notcp
   189→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_dns_tcp
   190→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_icmp_block_beyond
   191→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_icmp_sentry_only
   192→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_tcp443_allow_anthropic
   193→  butr_case_enroll "nsproto-security" rbtcns_tcp443_block_google
   194→
   195→  # srjcl-jupyter suite
   196→  butr_suite_enroll "srjcl-jupyter" "" "zrbtb_setup_srjcl"
   197→  butr_case_enroll "srjcl-jupyter" rbtcsj_jupyter_connectivity
   198→  butr_case_enroll "srjcl-jupyter" rbtcsj_jupyter_running
   199→  butr_case_enroll "srjcl-jupyter" rbtcsj_websocket_kernel
   200→
   201→  # pluml-diagram suite
   202→  butr_suite_enroll "pluml-diagram" "" "zrbtb_setup_pluml"
   203→  butr_case_enroll "pluml-diagram" rbtcpl_http_headers
   204→  butr_case_enroll "pluml-diagram" rbtcpl_invalid_hash
   205→  butr_case_enroll "pluml-diagram" rbtcpl_local_diagram
   206→  butr_case_enroll "pluml-diagram" rbtcpl_malformed_diagram
   207→  butr_case_enroll "pluml-diagram" rbtcpl_text_rendering
   208→
   209→  # regime-smoke suite
   210→  butr_suite_enroll "regime-smoke" "" "zrbtb_setup_regime"
   211→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_burc
   212→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_burs
   213→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_rbrn
   214→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_rbrr
   215→  butr_case_enroll "regime-smoke" butcrg_rbrv
   216→
   217→  # xname-validation suite
   218→  butr_suite_enroll "xname-validation" "" "zrbtb_setup_xname"
   219→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_debug
   220→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_defaults
   221→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_empty_optional
   222→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_env_wrapper
   223→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_invalid_chars
   224→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_invalid_start
   225→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_length
   226→  butr_case_enroll "xname-validation" butcvu_xname_valid
   227→
   228→}
   229→
   230→######################################################################
   231→# Routing
   232→
   233→rbtb_route() {
   234→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   235→  shift || true
   236→
   237→  test -n "${BURD_TEMP_DIR:-}"   || buc_die "BURD_TEMP_DIR not set - must be called from BURD"
   238→  test -n "${BURD_NOW_STAMP:-}"  || buc_die "BURD_NOW_STAMP not set - must be called from BURD"
   239→
   240→  rbtb_kindle
   241→
   242→  export ZBUTE_ROOT_TEMP_DIR="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"
   243→  export BUT_VERBOSE="${BUT_VERBOSE:-0}"
   244→
   245→  case "${z_command}" in
   246→    rbw-ta) butd_run_all ;;
   247→    rbw-ts) butd_run_suite "${1:-}" ;;
   248→    rbw-to) butd_run_one "${1:-}" ;;
   249→    rbw-tns) butd_run_suite "nsproto-security" ;;
   250→    rbw-tj) butd_run_suite "srjcl-jupyter" ;;
   251→    rbw-tpl) butd_run_suite "pluml-diagram" ;;
   252→    rbw-trg) butd_run_suite "regime-smoke" ;;
   253→    *)       buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}" ;;
   254→  esac
   255→}
   256→
   257→rbtb_main() {
   258→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   259→  shift || true
   260→  test -n "${z_command}" || buc_die "No command specified"
   261→  rbtb_route "${z_command}" "$@"
   262→}
   263→
   264→rbtb_main "$@"
   265→
   266→# eof
   267→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBW Workbench - Routes Recipe Bottle commands to CLIs
    20→#
    21→# Commands routed to rbob_cli.sh (require moniker imprint):
    22→#   rbw-s   Start service (sentry + censer + bottle)
    23→#   rbw-z   Stop service
    24→#   rbw-S   Connect to sentry container
    25→#   rbw-C   Connect to censer container
    26→#   rbw-B   Connect to bottle container
    27→#   rbw-o   Observe network traffic (tcpdump)
    28→#
    29→# Regime operations (pure routing to CLI scripts):
    30→#   rbw-rnr Render nameplate regime  → rbrn_cli.sh render
    31→#   rbw-rnv Validate nameplate regime → rbrn_cli.sh validate
    32→#   rbw-rvr Render vessel regime      → rbrv_cli.sh render
    33→#   rbw-rvv Validate vessel regime    → rbrv_cli.sh validate
    34→#   rbw-rrr Render repo regime        → rbrr_cli.sh render
    35→#   rbw-rrv Validate repo regime      → rbrr_cli.sh validate
    36→#   rbw-rrg Refresh GCB image pins    → rbrr_cli.sh refresh_gcb_pins
    37→#
    38→# Commands handled locally:
    39→#   rbw-lB  Local build from recipe (no moniker needed)
    40→
    41→set -euo pipefail
    42→
    43→# Get script directory
    44→RBW_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    45→
    46→# Source dependencies
    47→source "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    48→# Show filename on each displayed line
    49→buc_context "${0##*/}"
    50→
    51→# Verbose output if BURD_VERBOSE is set
    52→rbw_show() {
    53→  test "${BURD_VERBOSE:-0}" != "1" || echo "RBWSHOW: $*"
    54→}
    55→
    56→######################################################################
    57→# Routing
    58→
    59→rbw_route() {
    60→  local z_command="$1"
    61→  shift
    62→
    63→  rbw_show "Routing command: ${z_command} with args: $*"
    64→
    65→  # Verify BUD environment
    66→  test -n "${BURD_TEMP_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURD_TEMP_DIR not set - must be called from BUD"
    67→  test -n "${BURD_NOW_STAMP:-}" || buc_die "BURD_NOW_STAMP not set - must be called from BUD"
    68→
    69→  rbw_show "BUD environment verified"
    70→
    71→  # Route based on colophon
    72→  local z_rbob_cli="${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbob_cli.sh"
    73→
    74→  case "${z_command}" in
    75→
    76→    # Bottle operations (routed to rbob_cli.sh)
    77→    # Workbench translates BURD_TOKEN_3 (imprint) to RBOB_MONIKER for CLI
    78→    rbw-s|rbw-z|rbw-S|rbw-C|rbw-B|rbw-o)
    79→      test -n "${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}" || buc_die "${z_command} requires moniker imprint (BURD_TOKEN_3)"
    80→      export RBOB_MONIKER="${BURD_TOKEN_3}"
    81→      case "${z_command}" in
    82→        rbw-s)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_start          ;;
    83→        rbw-z)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_stop           ;;
    84→        rbw-S)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_connect_sentry ;;
    85→        rbw-C)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_connect_censer ;;
    86→        rbw-B)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_connect_bottle ;;
    87→        rbw-o)  exec "${z_rbob_cli}" rbob_observe        ;;
    88→      esac
    89→      ;;
    90→
    91→    # Nameplate regime operations (routed to rbrn_cli.sh)
    92→    rbw-rnr) exec "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_cli.sh" render   ${1+"$@"} ;;
    93→    rbw-rnv) exec "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_cli.sh" validate ${1+"$@"} ;;
    94→
    95→    # Vessel regime operations (routed to rbrv_cli.sh)
    96→    rbw-rvr) exec "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrv_cli.sh" render   ${1+"$@"} ;;
    97→    rbw-rvv) exec "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrv_cli.sh" validate ${1+"$@"} ;;
    98→
    99→    # Repo regime operations (routed to rbrr_cli.sh)
   100→    rbw-rrr) exec "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_cli.sh" render           ${1+"$@"} ;;
   101→    rbw-rrv) exec "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_cli.sh" validate         ${1+"$@"} ;;
   102→    rbw-rrg) exec "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_cli.sh" refresh_gcb_pins ${1+"$@"} ;;
   103→
   104→    # Cross-nameplate operations (routed to rbrn_cli.sh)
   105→    rbw-ni) exec "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_cli.sh" survey ${1+"$@"} ;;
   106→    rbw-nv) exec "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_cli.sh" audit  ${1+"$@"} ;;
   107→
   108→    # Test operations (routed to rbtb_testbench.sh)
   109→    rbw-ta|rbw-ts|rbw-to|rbw-tns|rbw-tj|rbw-tpl|rbw-trg)
   110→      exec "${RBW_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbtb_testbench.sh" "${z_command}" "$@"
   111→      ;;
   112→
   113→    # Unknown command
   114→    *)   buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}" ;;
   115→  esac
   116→}
   117→
   118→rbw_main() {
   119→  local z_command="${1:-}"
   120→  shift || true
   121→
   122→  test -n "${z_command}" || buc_die "No command specified"
   123→
   124→  rbw_route "${z_command}" "$@"
   125→}
   126→
   127→rbw_main "$@"
   128→
   129→# eof
   130→

content.text: Now I'll fix the workbench unknown command handling. Looking at the case statement, I can see the command groups:

input.new_string:
# Unknown command
    *)
      if [ -n "${z_command}" ]; then
        buc_warn "Unknown command: ${z_command}"
      fi
      buc_info "Available command groups:"
      buc_info ""
      buc_info "Bottle operations (require moniker imprint):"
      buc_info "  rbw-s   Start service (sentry + censer + bottle)"
      buc_info "  rbw-z   Stop service"
      buc_info "  rbw-S   Connect to sentry container"
      buc_info "  rbw-C   Connect to censer container"
      buc_info "  rbw-B   Connect to bottle container"
      buc_info "  rbw-o   Observe network traffic (tcpdump)"
      buc_info ""
      buc_info "Nameplate regime operations:"
